name: Risk Parity Full Universe
description: Risk Parity optimizing equal marginal risk contribution across all 13 assets: global equities (VUSA, EQQQ, AIGC, IIND, IMEU, IWRD), precious metals (SSLN, SGLN), commodities (COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA), and bonds (VUTY). Extends risk-parity's balanced risk budgeting to the full investable universe.
